regions.why: Saskatchewan prices have dropped 10.3¢ this week as crude slides toward pre-conflict levels. Current price sits 3% above the regional low, with downward momentum still in play. Expect further easing over the next few days.

regions.why: WTI crude is falling and already 3% down, with broader North American prices declining. Current price is only 3% above the recent low, and downward momentum suggests further drops are likely within days.
